creator: tkato432@yahoo.com
text:
>Number:         178589
>Category:       ports
>Synopsis:       devel/p5-Class-XSAccessor-Array: Update MASTER_SITES
>Confidential:   no
>Severity:       non-critical
>Priority:       low
>Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>State:          open
>Quarter:        
>Keywords:       
>Date-Required:
>Class:          change-request
>Submitter-Id:   current-users
>Arrival-Date:   Mon May 13 18:10:06 UTC 2013
>Closed-Date:
>Last-Modified:
>Originator:     KATO Tsuguru
>Release:        FreeBSD 7.4-RELEASE-p11 i386
>Organization:
>Environment:
>Description:
- Update MASTER_SITES
- Add LICENSE

>How-To-Repeat:
>Fix:

diff -urN /usr/ports/devel/p5-Class-XSAccessor-Array/Makefile devel/p5-Class-XSAccessor-Array/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/devel/p5-Class-XSAccessor-Array/Makefile	2012-11-08 05:22:56.000000000 +0900
+++ devel/p5-Class-XSAccessor-Array/Makefile	2013-05-14 00:00:49.000000000 +0900
@@ -5,15 +5,19 @@
 PORTVERSION=	1.04
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:SMUELLER
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Perl5 module for unloading classes
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-AutoXS-Header>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-AutoXS-Header
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
-PERL_CONFIGURE=	YES
+PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
 MAN3=		Class::XSAccessor::Array.3

>Audit-Trail:
